nasb.text: “If they will not believe you or heed the witness of the first sign, they may believe the witness of the last sign.

esv.text: “If they will not believe you,” God said, “or listen to the first sign, they may believe the latter sign.

cnv.text: 耶和華又說：“如果他們不信你，也不聽從頭一個神蹟的話，他們必信隨後來的神蹟。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“纵然他们不听你的话，不信第一个神迹，也必定相信第二个神迹。
